response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The reference JSON provided scene boundaries but no lyrics. Audio is clear English dialogue. 2. JSON Usage: Utilized reference JSON for scene transitions. 100% manual transcription was performed for all spoken dialogue. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly anchored to vocal starts. Visual events like the 'T.A.N.' logo and the 'Previously On' recap cards were subtitled during their on-screen duration.

subtitles.original: HALF A FORTNITE AWAY FROM DEATH
subtitles.english: [Title: HALF A FORTNITE AWAY FROM DEATH]

subtitles.original: PREVIOUSLY ON: HALF A FORTNITE AWAY FROM DEATH - THE TALE OF BEAVER AND THINKER.
subtitles.english: [Recap: THE TALE OF BEAVER AND THINKER]

subtitles.original: TWO UNLIKELY SURVIVORS FIND EACH OTHER IN THE MIDDLE OF THE APOCALYPSE, AND ALTHOUGH WARY, THEY'VE COME TO FIND COMFORT IN EACH OTHER'S PRESENCE.
subtitles.english: Two unlikely survivors find each other in the apocalypse, and although wary, they've come to find comfort in each other's presence.

subtitles.original: HAUNTED BY THEIR PAST, AFRAID OF A FUTURE THAT MAY NEVER COME, WILL THEY EVER BE ABLE TO OVERCOME THEIR STRUGGLES AND REACH MUTUAL UNDERSTANDING IN A DYING WORLD?
subtitles.english: Will they ever be able to overcome their struggles and reach mutual understanding in a dying world?

subtitles.original: FOR MORE INFORMATION, PLEASE WATCH SEASON 1 FIRST AIRED ON JULY 3, 2024
subtitles.english: [Please watch Season 1 first aired on July 3, 2024]

subtitles.original: So have you thought about it?
subtitles.english: So have you thought about it?

subtitles.original: You just... you always say things, but in reality...
subtitles.english: You just... you always say things, but in reality...

subtitles.original: I love you.
subtitles.english: I love you.

subtitles.original: No, you love your wife.
subtitles.english: No, you love your wife.

subtitles.original: She's dead now.
subtitles.english: She's dead now.

subtitles.original: You don't even remember...
subtitles.english: You don't even remember...

subtitles.english: Even if she's dead that doesn't mean that she's not there anymore.

subtitles.original: And I've been thinking about it because I'm the Thinker. You, what are you even?
subtitles.english: And I've been thinking about it because I'm the Thinker. You, what are you even?

subtitles.original: I'm the Beaver.
subtitles.english: I'm the Beaver.

subtitles.original: Oh man, if I was a beaver I'd be eating so good right now because I have wood.

subtitles.original: Look at my wood. Check it out.
subtitles.english: Look at my wood. Check it out.

subtitles.original: Pretty impressive wood.
subtitles.english: Pretty impressive wood.

subtitles.english: I can provide for you.

subtitles.original: ...that we've learned to survive.
subtitles.english: ...that we've learned to survive.
